picks.title: Palo Alto Earth Day Festival
picks.why: Annual Earth Day festival with hands-on sustainability activities and local environmental leaders in Palo Alto.

picks.title: Viva CalleSJ: East Side Quest
picks.venue: White Road and Alum Rock Avenue
picks.why: Rare open streets event closes East San José to cars—walk, bike, and explore your neighborhood car-free.

picks.title: STEM Zone: Where Silicon Valley Sparks Innovation and Fun
picks.why: Free STEM event featuring astronaut Sirisha Bandla and interactive exhibits—unique, inspiring, all ages welcome.
